events.summary: Banc of California filed prospectus supplement on Form S-3 to permit resale of voting common stock by certain selling stockholders.
Banc of California filed prospectus supplement on Form S-3 to permit resale of voting common stock by certain selling stockholders.
Ligand Pharmaceuticals has a PDUFA decision date for FILSPARI (sNDA) for focal segmental glomerulosclerosis treatment.
Ligand Pharmaceuticals' sNDA for FILSPARI in focal segmental glomerulosclerosis (FSGS) has PDUFA date of January 13, 2026.
Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost lunar lander completed first fully successful U.S. lunar soft landing since Apollo in March 2025.
Firefly Aerospace’s Blue Ghost Mission 2 lander is aiming to fly before the end of 2026.
Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost Mission 2 lander aiming to fly before end of 2026.
Firefly Aerospace plans to launch its Alpha rocket by early 2026 after resolving issues from a previous test explosion.
Firefly Aerospace seeks to launch its Alpha rocket by early 2026 and its Blue Ghost Mission 2 lunar lander before year-end.
Firefly Aerospace's Blue Ghost Mission 2 lander targeting launch before end of 2026.
Eaton, an industrial equipment manufacturer, is showing strong technical setups as industrials sector outpaces tech in early 2026.
